agent_analysis.hypothesis_rationale: Paying professional fundraising fees is a direct expense that might slightly lower overall log fundraising efficiency compared to organic fundraising channels.
agent_analysis.prior_art_notes: Thornton (2006) discusses structural determinants of professional fundraising returns.
agent_analysis.interpretation: A statistically significant but practically negligible negative correlation was found. Professional fundraising fees are associated with a very slight decrease in log fundraising efficiency.
